sourcesContent:
# composition-and-boundary fixture: collections in every applicable
# matrix position — member-object, call-callee, argument, assignment-value,
# return — with trivia at block boundaries. Inapplicable cells: ranges and
# slices lower to expressions (call-callee position covered via indexing);
# elisions appear only inside array literals by construction.
def first(list)
  return list[0]

def span(a, b)
  return [a..b]

m1 = [1, 2].length
m2 = {n: 5}.n
c1 = first([true, null])
c2 = [first, first][0]([7])
v1 = [x ?? y, 2 ** 3]
v2 = {k: x && y, m: [1..2]}
ix = data[i + 1]
sl = data[1..]

if true
  t = [1..3]

# trivia at a block boundary

while flag && data[0]

  # trivia inside a block
  flag = false

q = span(1, 3)

# statement position: array literals are valid bare; object literals are
# NOT in this fixture — they are pinned in the emitter tests; emission
# always
# groups, pinned as a divergence in emitter tests.
[9, 9]
